run.prompt: Looking directly at the camera, warm and confident expression, holding the product naturally at chest height.
run.text: Te voy a mostrar el producto que me cambió la rutina de la mañana.
run.product_prompt: The woman holds the amber product jar in her right hand at chest height, label facing the camera, natural grip.

run.scene_description: Clean linen surface with soft natural window light from the left, warm apothecary aesthetics.
run.prompt: Slow cinematic push-in over the linen surface, soft window light catching the product label, gentle depth of field.
run.text: Mirá los detalles: ingredientes simples, sin relleno.
run.product_prompt: The amber product jar rests centered on the linen surface, label fully visible and sharp, a few soft props around it.
